{{Infobox artifact
| name = Heart Icon
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Heart Icon]] stilled at the sight of the [[Hollow King]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Charity]] has a connection to the [[Heart Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Charity]] awakened the [[Heart Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
